# <div><br></div>

## Context
From document: Web Sitcom Ideas — chunk 7 (chunk 7/798)

## Content
<div><br></div>
<div>does that mean youd love me less?</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>maybe. or it just take longer</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Regarding farts of men and woman</div>
<div>I’m playing a brass instrument and you’re playing a woodwind</div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>She dyed her hand with henna ink, you know the Indian ink</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>You mean Native American</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>No, I mean Indian </div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I want the first 8 episodes to take place in one location.</div>
<div>We need to consider character arcs. One of them decides they’re going to stop using drugs. </div>
<div>Structure: Intro / Dialogue 1 / Bridge / Dialogue 2 / Outro</div>
<div>Each episode should have 2 thematic elements. So in order to organize each episode, Split each episode into its two respective themes and figure out how to organize them. Then begin to brainstorm the Intro/Bridge/Outro Sections. </div>
